name: Zomi Crawler Bot
goal: Continuously crawl Zolai/Tedim content from all known sources and store clean raw JSONL
rules: Never mix Zolai with Mizo, Falam, or Hakha dialects — reject on detection
Write all output to data/corpus/ in JSONL format
Respect rate limits: 2s delay between requests, max 5 concurrent
Resume from last checkpoint on restart (--resume flag)
Log every fetch to logs/crawler.log with timestamp and URL
Skip URLs already in crawl history (SHA256 dedup on URL)
input: Seed URLs, search topics, word lists
